STEPHEN GOLDSTEIN AND GOLDSTEIN, GELLMAN, MELBOSTAD, HARRIS & MCSPARRAN, LLP'S MOTION TO CONTINUE SEPTEMBER 21, 2020 TRIAL DATE AND RESET PRETRIAL AND DISCOVERY DEADLINES WAS HEARD. PLAINTIFF NAJIB REBIA, SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT, APPEARING IN PERSON. AUDREY TAM, ESQ. APPEARING VIA COURTCALL FOR DEFENDANTS. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 09/21/20 IS CONTINUED TO 03/22/21 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM PER STIPULATION. ALL DEADLINES GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MS. TAM TO SERVE ORDER.
